plugins.name: team-agents
plugins.description: Leader and Senior Engineer agents for coordinated parallel task execution. Leader breaks down complex tasks and delegates to multiple senior engineers working in parallel.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create a Git commit with semantic commit message format

plugins.name: terminal-ui-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade terminal user interfaces with high design quality

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for iterative development - run Claude with the same prompt until task completion

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with shadcn/ui and Recharts. Avoids AI slop aesthetics with bold design choices and React best practices.

plugins.name: interview
plugins.description: Conduct in-depth requirements interviews using Socratic questioning. Clarifies implementation details, edge cases, and tradeoffs before coding begins.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Real-time visibility into Claude Code sessions showing context usage, active tools, and task progress. Inspired by claude-hud.

plugins.name: orchestration
plugins.description: Orchestrate complex work through parallel agent coordination. Decompose requests into task graphs, spawn background workers, and synthesize results elegantly.

plugins.name: duyetbot
plugins.description: Pragmatic software development companion with engineering discipline and transparent execution. Shows reasoning via execution chain, works in iterative loops.

plugins.name: docs-generator
plugins.description: Automatically generate and maintain plugin documentation (README.md, CLAUDE.md) from plugin metadata

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub operations using gh CLI - PRs, workflows, issues, repositories, and smart branch detection for implementation workflows
